title: Codex task specification
description: Frontmatter contract for .agent-docs/tasks/<timestamp>-<slug>.md spec files consumed by `codex-companion task --task-spec`. The file body (everything after the closing `---`) is the Codex prompt verbatim. Runtime validation is hand-rolled in scripts/lib/spec-loader.mjs; this schema is the canonical reference.

title.description: Short imperative title; surfaces in commit messages and reports.

scope.description: Files or directories the task is allowed to touch. String or list of strings.

mode.description: write = commits land in a worktree; read-only = no edits; research = read-only, no worktree, prompt expects evidence-backed answer.

acceptance.description: Binary-testable conditions the supervisor cross-checks at the end. Required when mode = write.

commit_policy.description: Codex commit cadence. Default: per-phase for write, single for everything else.

verify_with.description: Reserved for v1.5 review handoff. Default: gpt-5.4.

timeout.description: Supervisor wall-clock cap, e.g. '45m' or '2h'. Default: 45m (matches the agent's hard cap).
